entity.summary: European centralized cryptocurrency exchange founded in 2018 and operated within the W Group ecosystem, offering spot, margin, futures, and related digital-asset services.
entity.notes: Official company material identifies a 2018 founding and continuing operation within the W Group ecosystem. HEI retains Ukraine as the existing historical origin classification.

expected.summary: Ukraine-based centralized exchange launched in 2018 and still operating under the WhiteBIT brand.
